description.en:
## Overview

Khao Matsee Viewpoint sits on a coastal hilltop about 20 kilometers southeast of Chumphon town near the Pak Nam area, offering sweeping 360-degree panoramas of the Gulf of Thailand coastline, the Tha Tapao river estuary, and scattered offshore islands. The name Matsee is sometimes humorously translated as "Must See" by local tourism promoters, and the viewpoint genuinely lives up to that billing, especially at sunset when the Gulf waters turn gold and the silhouettes of distant islands become visible on the horizon.

## The Experience

A paved road leads up to the hilltop where a viewing platform and small pavilion provide unobstructed views in every direction. To the east, the Gulf of Thailand stretches to the horizon with fishing boats dotting the water. Below, the coastline curves through mangrove-lined bays and sandy beaches, while the Pak Nam Chumphon river estuary is visible to the north. On clear days, the islands of Mu Ko Chumphon National Park can be spotted in the distance. The viewpoint is rarely crowded, typically visited only by local joggers, couples, and the occasional photographer, making it one of the most peaceful sunset spots on the entire Gulf coast.

## Facilities

The hilltop area has been modestly developed with a viewing platform, parking area, and clean restrooms. A small restaurant and cafe near the viewpoint serves drinks and simple Thai dishes, allowing visitors to enjoy a meal with the panoramic view. The facilities are basic but well-maintained, and the lack of heavy commercial development adds to the peaceful character of the spot.

## Practical Information

Khao Matsee Viewpoint is open daily from 6:00 AM to 9:00 PM with free admission. To get here from Chumphon town, take Road 4119 for about 19 kilometers then turn right onto Road 4098 and follow signs for about one kilometer. The viewpoint is best visited in the late afternoon for sunset, though early morning also offers beautiful light. Avoid midday visits when the hilltop is exposed and very hot. The viewpoint combines well with a visit to Pak Nam Chumphon for seafood before or after watching the sunset.
description.nl: Een heuvel-uitkijkpunt bij Pak Nam Chumphon met panoramisch uitzicht over de kustlijn, riviermonding en eilanden. Het beste te bezoeken bij zonsondergang wanneer de Golf van Thailand goud kleurt. Zelden bezocht door iemand anders dan lokale joggers en stellen, waardoor het een van de meest vredige zonsondergangplekken aan de Golfkust is.

best_time_to_visit: Late afternoon for sunset; early morning for photography in soft light
tips: Arrive 30 minutes before sunset for the best golden light over the Gulf of Thailand
Combine with a seafood dinner at Pak Nam Chumphon which is just a short drive down the hill
Avoid midday visits as the exposed hilltop gets extremely hot without shade

metaTitle.en: Khao Matsee Viewpoint - Chumphon Sunset Views | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Khao Matsee Uitkijkpunt - Chumphon Zonsondergang | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Visit Khao Matsee Viewpoint in Chumphon. Panoramic sunset views of the coastline and Gulf islands from a peaceful hilltop.
metaDescription.nl: Bezoek Khao Matsee Uitkijkpunt in Chumphon. Panoramische zonsondergangvistas van de kustlijn en Golfeilanden vanaf een vredige heuveltop.
